description: You are an OLPC curriculum coordinator in a developing nation. To ensure digital library texts are at an appropriate reading level for 5th-grade students, compute the Automated Readability Index (ARI) of 'Alice's Adventures in Wonderland' (/home/ga/Documents/alice_in_wonderland.txt) and author an official curriculum review document. Create a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/ari_calculator.py to calculate the ARI using the formula: ARI = 4.71 * (characters / words) + 0.5 * (words / sentences) - 21.43. For this calculation, count alphanumeric characters only, define words by splitting on whitespace, and sentences by terminal punctuation (., !, ?). Document your findings in an ODT file saved to /home/ga/Documents/alice_review.odt. The document must include the heading 'Literary Text Readability Assessment', the book title 'Alice's Adventures in Wonderland', and the calculated total words, total sentences, and ARI score.
